title: agrostis stolonifera var. maritima
intro: Agrostis stolonifera var. maritima, also known as sea bent or beach grass, is a type of perennial grass that is commonly found in coastal areas. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects, making it useful in treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Agrostis stolonifera var. maritima include its ability to soothe digestive issues and reduce inflammation, as well as its potential to lower blood sugar levels. In herbal preparations, the plant can be used to make teas, infusions, and salves, which can be used topically to aid in wound healing and reduce inflammation.
